# GitHub Portfolio Template

This is a modern, production-ready portfolio template built with Vue 3 and Vite.

## Quick Start

1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Start development: `npm run dev`
3. Build for production: `npm run build`

## Customization

- Update personal information in component files (src/components/)
- Modify colors by changing CSS variables or hex colors
- Add your actual projects to Projects.vue
- Integrate backend for contact form (optional)

## Deployment Ready

- Build optimized for production
- Responsive design for all devices
- Dark mode included
- Can be deployed to GitHub Pages, Vercel, or Netlify
